name: Cracker Barrel Raisin Cookies
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Light brown sugar, firmly packed
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour boiling water over the raisins and let stand for about 10 minutes; drain the raisins.
2. Cream together butter, granulated sugar, and egg until well combined. Add vanilla extract and sour cream, mixing until smooth.
3. Gradually add flour, baking soda, salt, nutmeg, and drained raisins to the butter mixture, stirring until just combined.
4. Chill the dough in the refrigerator for about 1 hour to allow it to firm up.
5. Roll the chilled dough into 1-inch balls and place them 2 to 2 1/2 inches apart on a greased cookie sheet.
6. If desired, drop spoonfuls of dough instead of rolling into balls.
7. Flatten each ball with a fork first in one direction, then in the other.
8. Bake at 375°F for about 15 minutes or until golden brown.
